overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player ascends a large staircase and traverses elevated walkways past digital billboards, food kiosks, and other pedestrians, ending with a view of traffic on a busy street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level entrance to elevated walkway

events.description: begins ascending the large concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: walking toward and climbing the wide staircase with green painted walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the base of the stairs

entered.detail: building facade with green neon OPEN sign
wide concrete staircase with green painted side walls and metal railings
large digital screens mounted on the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at ground level near a yellow building with a neon 'OPEN' sign. The player approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase with green painted walls, moving from the street level up toward an elevated plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with digital advertising

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the open elevated plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the elevated plaza past groups of pedestrians and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians conversing in the plaza

entered.detail: open paved pedestrian area at the top of the staircase
tall digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements
small structure with green roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the staircase, the scene opens into a wide elevated plaza at night. Large vertical digital screens display advertisements on the left while groups of pedestrians stand conversing. The player walks forward across the paved surface toward a green-roofed structure in the distance.

events.description: dialogue interaction prompt appears on screen offering conversation option

agents.ego_description: walking past the food kiosk and other pedestrians in the covered corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian leaning against the food kiosk counter

entered.detail: yellow and green food stall with metal security grill and illuminated interior
concrete benches with glowing red neon lights underneath

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrower covered walkway featuring a food vending kiosk on the right with a green roof and yellow walls. Red neon-lit benches line the left side. The player passes pedestrians and approaches the end of the corridor where a dialogue interaction prompt briefly appears.

events.description: entering darker corridor illuminated by purple neon strip lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor with glowing purple neon accents and red trees

entered.detail: glowing purple neon strips mounted along concrete planters
trees with bright red leaves planted in raised concrete beds
barriers with yellow and black DANGER signage

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a darker corridor illuminated by vibrant purple neon strip lights along the right side. Red-leaved trees in concrete planters add color to the scene. The player passes yellow danger warning barriers as the walkway continues forward.

events.description: exiting enclosed corridor into open area with view of street below

agents.ego_description: walking toward the edge overlooking the busy street below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the distance near the overlook

entered.detail: large building with classical architectural elements and modern digital billboard
open edge of the plaza overlooking the multi-lane street below

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a wider plaza area with a large historic-style building on the right featuring a prominent digital billboard. The red-leaved trees now appear on the left as the player approaches the edge of the elevated walkway overlooking the street below.

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway overlooking the busy street with moving traffic

notable_agents.action: cars driving on the wet multi-lane street below with neon reflections

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
wet street with moving traffic and colorful neon light reflections

segments.scene_description: The player walks along an elevated walkway with a metal railing overlooking a busy multi-lane street below. Wet pavement reflects the neon lights from surrounding buildings as cars drive along the road. The walkway continues under an overpass structure with buildings on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit street level up through a series of elevated urban plazas and corridors. It begins at the base of a yellow building, ascending a wide concrete staircase with green walls that leads away from the street toward an upper level. As the camera emerges into a wide plaza, the space opens up with large vertical digital advertisements and groups of pedestrians before narrowing into a covered walkway featuring a green-roofed food kiosk and red neon benches. The scene then shifts into a darker corridor illuminated by vibrant purple strip lights and red-leaved trees, passing yellow warning barriers as the path expands once more toward a historic-style building with a prominent digital billboard. Finally, the camera moves along a metal railing to overlook a busy multi-lane street where wet pavement reflects the surrounding city lights.
